targetSenders().details: Returns sender allowlist configured via `targetSender` (empty means no sender allowlist).

invariant_activeOption_hasExpiry().notice: An active option always has a non-zero expiry (sanity on write path).

invariant_cancelOnlyBeforeBuy().notice: cancelOption can only be called before the option is bought.         isCancelled and isBought must be mutually exclusive.

invariant_exercised_implies_notActive().notice: An exercised option is never marked active.

invariant_ghostLocked_matchesVaultBalanc.notice: Ghost tracker matches on-chain vault underlying balance exactly.

invariant_vaultUnderlyingGeqActiveLocked.notice: Vault's underlying balance >= total underlying locked in active options.
